title: Little Lane Cafe
description: A neighbourhood cafe in Richmond that wanted to stand out in Melbourne's crowded coffee scene. We built a community-first content strategy that doubled their weekday covers.
body:
## The Brief

Little Lane is a corner cafe in Richmond — great coffee, beautiful space, but invisible online. The owner felt like she was competing against hundreds of identical Melbourne cafes and couldn't break through.

## Our Approach

We differentiated through community content. Instead of just posting latte art and avocado toast (like every other cafe), we told stories: the regular who's been coming since day one, the barista's journey from home brewing to competition, the local artist whose work hangs on the walls.

We also launched a weekly "Local's Pick" Story series where followers voted on the next special menu item.

## The Results

Little Lane grew from 1,200 to 9,800 Instagram followers in 4 months. Weekday covers doubled as the account became a genuine community hub. The story-driven approach caught the attention of Broadsheet Melbourne, who featured them in a round-up of the city's best neighbourhood cafes.
